NPC-GENERATOR-5E.App.Title: NPC Generator
NPC-GENERATOR-5E.App.ArchetypeHint: Ability scores, AC, HP, and attacks are auto-generated to roughly fit the chosen CR. Spellcasters (Cultist, Priest, Mage) also get a small rolled spell package.
NPC-GENERATOR-5E.App.NoCompendiumsAvaila: No Actor compendiums are available. Enable one (e.g. a Monster Manual pack) under your world's Compendium Packs settings.
NPC-GENERATOR-5E.App.NoActorsInCompendiu: No actors found in the checked compendiums
NPC-GENERATOR-5E.App.Name: Name
NPC-GENERATOR-5E.App.SpeciesAppliedHint: The species item will be embedded on the actor. Open its sheet's Advancements afterward to finish any ability score increases or choice-based traits dnd5e requires.
NPC-GENERATOR-5E.App.NoSpeciesConfigured: No Species compendiums are configured. Set them up under Module Settings → Compendium Links.
NPC-GENERATOR-5E.App.NoStatSheetReroll: This NPC was cloned from a specifically-chosen actor, so its base stat sheet can't be re-rolled — edit the fields directly instead.
NPC-GENERATOR-5E.Warnings.NoMatch: No NPC stat blocks match the requested challenge rating.
NPC-GENERATOR-5E.Warnings.PackNotFound: Configured custom statblock compendium "{packId}" was not found; using bundled SRD stat blocks only.
NPC-GENERATOR-5E.Warnings.NoTemplateSele: Check at least one compendium and choose an actor to generate from.
NPC-GENERATOR-5E.Warnings.NoArchetypeSel: Choose an archetype to generate from.
NPC-GENERATOR-5E.Warnings.TemplateNotFou: The selected template actor could not be loaded from the compendium.
NPC-GENERATOR-5E.Settings.IncludeBundled: Include the 20 SRD 5.1 open-content NPC stat blocks (Commoner, Guard, Veteran, Mage, etc.) shipped with this module in the generation pool.
NPC-GENERATOR-5E.Settings.CustomStatbloc: Optional. The pack ID (e.g. world.my-npcs) of an Actor compendium you own or built — such as one drawn from a published volume — to use as additional or alternative generation sources, bucketed automatically by each actor's Challenge Rating.
Optional. The UUID of a RollTable to draw NPC names from instead of the bundled generic name lists.
NPC-GENERATOR-5E.CompendiumLinks.MenuHin: Wire up which of your Item compendiums supply Species, mundane Equipment, and Spells to the NPC Generator.
NPC-GENERATOR-5E.CompendiumLinks.Title: NPC Generator: Compendium Links
NPC-GENERATOR-5E.CompendiumLinks.Hint: Check compendiums below to wire their content into the generator. Nothing here affects generation until you Save. All three sections list the same Item compendiums — a pack only needs to be checked in the sections relevant to what it contains.
NPC-GENERATOR-5E.CompendiumLinks.NoPacks: No Item compendiums are available yet. Enable one under your world's Compendium Packs settings first.
NPC-GENERATOR-5E.CompendiumLinks.Species: Species/Race items from checked compendiums appear in the generator's Species dropdown and get embedded on generated NPCs.
NPC-GENERATOR-5E.CompendiumLinks.ItemsHi: If any compendium is checked here, generated NPCs carry real Items pulled from it instead of the built-in flavor-text inventory.
NPC-GENERATOR-5E.CompendiumLinks.SpellsH: If any compendium is checked here, Quick Template spellcasters (Cultist, Priest, Mage) get real Spell items pulled from it instead of flavor-text spell names.
